title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!
